Pakistan Reports Mine in Strait of Hormuz Area
#oott
quoted_text:
Pakistan reported a mine in the Strait of Hormuz area, according to a notice from its National Hydrographic Office, even as the US and Iran announced a deal to end their conflict and move toward normalizing shipping through the vital waterway.

The mine was reported just off the northwest tip of the Musandam peninsula, the Omani exclave that protrudes into the strait. All vessels transiting through the area are advised to navigate with extreme caution, the notice said.
#oott https://t.co/UIvfqlK
